---
id: record-event
title: "Record an instrument lifecycle event"
description: "Records a coupon, call, maturity, corporate action, or custom event on a SHARABLE instrument. Returns 400 if the instrument is PERPETUAL."
sidebar_label: "Record an instrument lifecycle event"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Record an instrument lifecycle event"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/instruments/{id}/events"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Records a coupon, call, maturity, corporate action, or custom event on a SHARABLE instrument. Returns 400 if the instrument is PERPETUAL.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
